narrative:
Jackson/Dexter City 2 (precinct in Noble County) has 349 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
